name: veeam-mcp
description: Every Veeam Service Provider Console endpoint as a typed command, plus a local multi-tenant mirror, cross-company rollups, and drift detection no per-instance Veeam tool offers.

veeam_base_url.title: VEEAM_BASE_URL
veeam_base_url.description: Your VSPC appliance REST API base URL, e.g. https://vspc.example.com:1280/api/v3. The console is appliance-hosted, so this is per-instance and required.

veeam_token.title: VEEAM_TOKEN
veeam_token.description: Bearer token for the VSPC REST API (POST /token with your portal credentials).
